name: electronic-journal
description: Электронный журнал успеваемости — React + Node.js + PostgreSQL

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup:
npm run install:all && echo '
✅ Dependencies installed.
📝 Copy backend/.env.example to backend/.env and fill in DB credentials.
🔑 After first register, run: cd backend && node make-admin.js "Ваше имя"'
